steps.t: Gandalf is atop Treebeard's Hill, alongside a horse you have never seen before. Gandalf has one more thing to say to you.
Ashlimb is at the eastern edge of Fangorn's eaves, waiting to hear of the hobbits' fate. You should return to Ashlimb and convey Gandalf's tale of the…
Ents can be found throughout Fangorn. You should search north-east of Ashlimb for other Ents you can help, as Gandalf bid.
